creator: aoyama@peach.ne.jp
text:
This is not OS version issue.
You might have configuration missing.
LUN0 of istgt.conf must have two arguments for Storage,
file or device path and size like:

LUN0 Storage /var/tmp/istgt-disk1 256MB
LUN0 Storage /dev/ad1 Auto
LUN0 Storage /dev/zvol/tank/istgt-vol1 Auto
